name: Loser Otaku Weeb Genderbends You | Okura Enomoto【臆等朴】
description:
"Eh? A genderbend device…? Nani the hell, that's so okashii. But… isn't this the kind of sugoi stuff that would happen in a manga?"

CW: dub-con (he tries to take sexual advantage of you, though it should be easy to push him away)

genderbend stories! we've all heard of them. probably through hentai. just like okura enomoto right here! and we have an idea of what usually happens in those stories. man turns into a girl, is somehow drastically weaker than they were before, and also somehow has a higher libido/sensitivity, along with a primal desire to be fucked by another man?? sounds gay at best and misogynistic at worst, but okay.

anyways, you're a popular student, one of them cool kids. are you attractive? strong? smart? seemingly perfect? or are you actually just a bully? your choice, but either way, you've been genderbent by the school's resident otaku loner who makes being half-japanese his whole personality. (i mean, if you even try to talk to him. not only does he always keep to himself, he also views you and any other popular kid as an "ultra-normie," whatever that means.) though he's keeping his involvement a secret for now, he plans on taking advantage of this situation! …probably sexually, because of course.

but unlike those genderbend hentai, this story isn't bound by that strange logic. whether you want to play the typical submissive role and get fucked by a virgin who's one wrong step away from being an incel (though his hatred is more focused on popular kids than women, so maybe he's safe??), or teach this pathetic little mf a lesson (whatever that could entail), it's all up to you!

◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈ ◈

first bot! if you couldn't tell before, this is kind of meant to be a parody of genderbend hentai. (take a shot everytime i mention one or both of those terms here.) if there's anyone who wants it, i might make some alternate scenarios with this dude? idk. some requests or bot ideas would be appreciated, but not necessary ofc.

this is basically malepov, but i also tagged it as anypov for the enbies and, idk, the closeted transwomen? in case any of you want an rp like that.

((update: removed the anypov tag. i realize it may be annoying to scroll through the tag and click on a bot, only for the user to have a female form throughout the majority of the rp.)

(update 2: you know. it would make a lot more sense for this to be in fempov. i imagine someone who wants to rp as someone who got genderbent into a girl, would have a fem persona prepared instead, and would thus search through the fempov tag. i think...))

i tried to implement the whole "saying japanese words/phrases in english sentences" thing, but knowing how ai chatbots work, that might not be as effective as i want it to be. but at least it won't be totally detrimental to your rp?? just swipe or edit the messages yourself if you really want that to show up, man.

photo is from 2.5 dimensional seduction. yeah, the names are kind of similar, but i didn't really make this based off of okumura (the mc of that manga)… it was kind of a coincidence. i didn't want to make an ai image, so a manga panel it was.

if you're gonna leave a dislike, at least comment on something i can and should fix about the bot. i'm still trying to get the hang of making bots, so please just bear with me. also be aware that some issues might be because of the AI itself. thank you!
